# 👋 Welcome to Apex POS

**A complete point-of-sale system that runs entirely in your browser — no server, no cloud, no account required.**

| 🧾 Register | 📦 Inventory | 👥 Customers | 💸 Expenses | 📊 Reports | 🏷️ NFC Tags |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

---

### ✨ Features at a glance

- ✅ **Offline-first** — works with zero connectivity after first visit
- ✅ **100% client-side** — all data stays in your browser's IndexedDB
- ✅ **PWA installable** — add to home screen on any device
- ✅ **No build step** — open `index.html` and start selling
- ✅ **Dark mode** — built-in theme toggle
- ✅ **NFC support** — read/write tags on Android Chrome (experimental)
- ✅ **Printable receipts** — 80mm thermal-print layout
- ✅ **CSV import/export** — bulk manage your inventory
- ✅ **Keyboard shortcuts** — power-user navigation
- ✅ **Google Sign-In** — optional SSO integration
- ✅ **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.2 focusable, screen-reader friendly

### 🚀 Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/DLinacre/Apex-POS.git
cd Apex-POS
python3 -m http.server 8080
# Open http://localhost:8080
```

Or just **[try it live](https://dlinacre.github.io/Apex-POS/)** — no install needed.

---

<p align="center">
  <sub>Built with ❤️ using Vue 3, Dexie.js, Chart.js &amp; Tailwind CSS</sub>
</p>
